{{Quote|But now, actually being able to create something in Star Wars, rather than just report on it, is infinitely better.|Brett Rector|<ref name="Podcast Special">{{SWArchive|url=welcome/about/news/news20070228.html|text=starwars.com Podcast Special}}</ref>}}
'''Brett Rector''' is a producer and editor on various ''[[Star Wars]]'' projects. He has worked on many [[Star Wars video games|video game]] manuals, and he served as editor-in-chief of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' from [[2004]] to [[2005]]. He also was an assistant producer for ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'', ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed: Ultimate Sith Edition]]'', ''[[LEGO Star Wars III: The Clone Wars]]'', and ''[[Kinect Star Wars]]''. He was a co-author of ''[[The Art and Making of Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]''.<ref name="LinkedIn" />
